violations.text: Bags of ice were observed stored on the floor in the walk-in freezer. Food (including ice) must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2025
Inspector observed a very heavy accumulation of leaf litter and other debris around refuse area. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2025

The floors in the walk-in cooler have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2025
Various beverages and ice were observed stored on the floor in the walk-in cooler and freezer. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2025

Cardboard is used as a shelf liner in the walk-in cooler. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the fan blades have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2025
Inspector observed a heavy acculturation of leaf litter and other debris around refuse area. Area to be maintained clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2025

The floors and walls throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2025

Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the kitchen. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. PIC replaced. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2025

Various deli meat sandwiches were observed held between 47-51 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC discarded. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2025
Various food items and beverages were observed stored on the floor in the walk-in freezer and cooler. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2025

Cardboard is used in the construction of shelf liners in the walk-in cooler area. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. New Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2025
Grab-N-Go cooler located in the retail area was not in good repair. Inspector observed an ambient of 48 degrees F. New Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2025

The following non-food contact surfaces have an accumulation of debris: - Condenser coils under Grab-N-Go cooler, - Ice buildup on bottom retail shelf of the Grab-N-Go cooler, - Fan blades of the walk-in cooler. New Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2025
Inspector observed a heavy accumulation of leaf litter and other debris around refuse area. Area to be maintained clean. New Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2025

The floors and walls throughout the facility (including in walk-in cooler and under retail shelves) have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2025
